text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Kikuka Sho. The final race of
the coveted Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having made it here despite her struggle with
injuries, Tokai Teio steps up to take her place as
the star of this climactic race!
